bottega_metadata.guild_affiliation: Arte dei Medici e Speziali (Doctors and Apothecaries)

spatial_architecture.structure: Stone vaulted arches with timber mezzanine
spatial_architecture.openings: Two street-facing arched portals with heavy timber shutters
spatial_architecture.lighting: Natural daylight from street portals and high mezzanine windows
spatial_architecture.decor: Faded religious frescoes on plaster walls; guild shields mounted above exits

personnel.action: Pulling the heavy horizontal press lever
Inking the chase and setting fresh parchment
Reviewing freshly printed proof for errors
Grinding raw pigments on a marble slab

public_facing_portal.elements: Curious citizens and patrons peering in from the street
public_facing_portal.sales_table: Displaying broadsides and woodcut prints for sale

wear_indicators: Ink-stained stone flooring around the press
Scattered paper scraps and discarded proofs
Sacks of lime and plaster dust near the sculptor's corner
Rounded edges on heavy timber furniture
